default.title: Free delivery
default.description: Order now and you'll get delivery absolutely free. Well, it's not actually free, we just price it into the products.

default.title: 10-year warranty
default.description: We have a 10 year warranty with every product that you purchase, whether that's a new pen or organizer.

default.title: Exchanges
default.description: We understand that when your product arrives you might not particularly like it, or you ordered the wrong thing.

default.title: For the planet
default.description: Like you, we love the planet, and so we've pledged 1% of all sales to the preservation of the natural environment.
